description: Long rambling whole-house walk (~1400 words / ~8k chars, exceeds the live-window budget): self-corrections, tangents, multiple systems/rooms, a dozen genuine items scattered throughout, several chatter distractors.

items.text: replace the GFCI outlet in the upstairs bathroom
keep the original hardwood in the hallway instead of replacing it with LVP
attic insulation looks thin, R-19 at best, worth batting up before winter
exposed wiring in the basement junction box needs a cover plate before anyone touches it
going with a tankless water heater instead of repairing the old tank
roughly twelve hundred dollars for the water heater swap including venting changes
order a 40-amp double-pole breaker for the sub panel
caulk the gap around the exterior sillplate on the west side
deck stair handrail wobbles, tighten or replace the lag bolts
get the roofer to look at curling shingles on the north slope
need a new flapper and fill valve for the downstairs toilet
call the HVAC guy to check the furnace short cycling

distractors: might grab a coffee before the next stop
traffic was brutal getting over here
the dog needs a vet appointment sometime
we'll see if it rains this weekend
reminds me of a job we did last year, different story though
mailbox post is leaning a little, needs to be reset in concrete
